inline_comments.message: This is to avoid docker restart in case Molecule tests run docker container with /var/run/docker.sock mount binded from host.

we still need to instal python module for docker. but it won't be from community build but it should be possible to use something from rhel/centos repositories.
It should be python-docker-py (or python-docker should work as well). 
If we would drop support for rancher from casablanca then only infra-server needs it.

Indeed, will fix. It's being downloaded here https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/85907/9/ansible/roles/docker/handlers/docker_restart.yml#13 so another issue with 85907.
This also shows that out Molecule framework will not always allow us to catch bugs. In this case tests passed because docker image for container in which tests are run has this package preinstalled...
